notes: Christian presbyter and martyr at Antioch, noted for his excellent life and defense of the Christian faith.

docs.title: Ecclesiastical History, Book 9
docs.author: Eusebius
docs.excerpt: … a most excellent man in every respect, temperate in life and famed for his learning in sacred things, was brought to the city of Nicomedia , where at that time the emperor happened to be staying, and after delivering before the ruler an apology for the doctrine which he professed, was committed to
